summary: Rough Requirement Feature for RE Projects - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend API accepts rough_requirement in PATCH /api/crm/leads/{lead_id}/stage, stores it in re_projects collection. Frontend CRMSales.jsx has dialog with data-testid='rough-requirement-textarea' and data-testid='submit-rough-estimate'. REProjectsPage shows 'Sales Rough Requirement' card (data-testid='rough-requirement-card') when rough_requirement exists.

backend_tests.move_without_rough_requirement: PASS - PATCH without rough_requirement still creates RE project (backward compatible)

seed_data_creation: Created test leads: TEST_RoughReq_ef8f94 (with rough_requirement), TEST_NoReq_be8fbd (without rough_requirement)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rough Requirement feature fully implemented and tested. When Sales moves a lead to 'Rough Estimate Requested' stage, a popup with textarea appears (data-testid='rough-requirement-textarea'). The rough_requirement is stored in re_projects collection and displayed on REProjectsPage in an amber card (data-testid='rough-requirement-card'). Test created 2 new leads in 'Rough Estimate Requested' stage and 2 RE projects with status 're_requested'. Existing leads: TEST_RoughReq_ef8f94 (has rough requirement), TEST_NoReq_be8fbd (no rough requirement), Mr. Vinoth (in RE Shared stage).
